visual_observations.composition_style: overhead tabletop spread — multiple dishes filling frame with text overlay and single hand reaching into bread basket
visual_observations.lighting: warm overhead studio or natural, even lighting, rich food colors
props_visible: Cast iron skillet with shakshuka/egg-tomato dish with labneh swirl and herb garnish
Mixed salad plate with radishes, herbs, microgreens

characters_visible.wardrobe_notes: Only right hand visible — ring and bracelet worn
characters_visible.gesture_notes: Right hand reaching into bread basket — natural dining gesture

text_overlays.content_summary: فطور عسيب — Aseeb Breakfast (brand name + meal type label with teal arrow logo)

notable_visual_elements: Cast iron skillet = premium/artisan cooking signal
Hand in frame creates 'live moment' authenticity — not sterile product shot
Teal brand arrow motif integrated as text overlay
'فطور عسيب' positions breakfast as a branded experience, not just a meal

hospitality_cues: Abundant spread with multiple dishes = Saudi generous breakfast hospitality
Flatbread in woven basket = traditional Saudi breakfast staple
cultural_notes.free_notes: The cast iron skillet with shakshuka is a modern brunch-culture element embedded in a traditional spread. The woven bread basket and flatbread anchor it to Saudi heritage. The hand reaching in creates a POV 'dine-with-me' effect. 'فطور عسيب' (Aseeb breakfast) brand-stamps the meal format — the restaurant has multiple branded meal occasions.

pattern_matches.notes: Classic overhead tabletop spread — multiple dishes filling frame in warm light
Hand in frame creates live dining moment, not static product shot
